channel.title: UniDoxia Blog
channel.description: Source-checked guidance on studying abroad — visas, scholarships, admissions, and common application mistakes.

item.title: UK Student Visa Brake in 2026: What Cameroon and Sudan Applicants Need to Know
item.description: Official GOV.UK guidance on the 2026 UK Student visa brake, whether a CAS helps, and what Cameroon and Sudan applicants should check next.

item.title: 4 UK Scholarships for African Students Before Autumn 2026
item.description: Four verified UK scholarships open to African students ahead of the Autumn 2026 intake, with eligibility, deadlines, and official links.

item.title: UK Student Visa Funds in 2026: 7 Evidence Mistakes to Avoid
item.description: Current UK Student visa maintenance figures, the 28-day rule, and seven evidence mistakes that can put an otherwise strong application at risk.
